statement: Strategy adopted (Nenad: 'you are right on every point, you do it'): the verifier is the product (offline plain-language verdict tool); EU AI Act Article 12 + agent liability insurance are the forcing-function buyers; eIDAS-qualified TSA braid leg gives statutory legal presumption; elara-mcp is the agent-economy distribution channel; we are the first Validation IPO (deliberate dogfood, starting with these records).
